about.title: A short founder profile, not a resume page.
about.paragraph1: Alikhan is a full-stack developer from Almaty, Kazakhstan with a strong frontend background and a product mindset.
about.paragraph2: I build web, mobile and backend systems using Nuxt, Angular, Flutter, NestJS and MongoDB.
about.paragraph3: His focus is SaaS, marketplaces, UI systems, monetization and startup execution.

products.title: Products and startup directions inside the Alixan ecosystem.
products.description: These are not random side projects. Each one explores a market, a workflow or a product system worth building seriously.

takta.label: Marketplace
takta.title: Takta.kz
takta.description: Mobile classifieds platform for Kazakhstan with mobile app, web platform, backend and realtime chat.

ui.title: Alixan UI

wedding.title: Wedding startup
wedding.description: A new startup idea for organizing weddings and toys in Kazakhstan: guests, budget, invitations and vendor catalog.

freelance.label: Marketplace Experiment
freelance.title: FreelancePlus
freelance.description: A freelance marketplace experiment with online payments, profiles, bids and order management.

uiSection.title: Design system for fast product building.
uiSection.description: Alixan UI is a growing component system for building modern SaaS, dashboards, landing pages and e-commerce products with clean Vue and Nuxt components.
